data.title: Cardano On the Edge: Will $0.47 Be the Bounce or the Break?
data.description:
"Cardano is currently navigating a critical juncture in its price movement, prompting speculation and analysis around the significant threshold of $0.47. Investors and traders alike are pondering whether this level will serve as a supportive bounce point, leading to a potential resurgence in the cryptocurrency's value, or if it will ultimately give way to a breakdown, resulting in further declines in its market price."
source: https://blocknews.com/cardano-on-the-edge-will-0-47-be-the-bounce-or-the-break/

data.title: Chairman of the U.S. Digital Asset Financial Advisory Committee: The proportion of cryptocurrency portfolios can increase to 10-40%
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: Ric Edelman, chairman of the Digital Assets Council of Financial Advisors, said in an interview with CNBC that it is recommended to allocate 10% to 40% of investment funds to cryptocurrencies, while four years ago his recommendation was 1%. Ric Edelman said that four years ago, he did not know whether the US government would ban Bitcoin, or whether the technology would become obsolete, and whether consumers and institutions would accept and adopt Bitcoin, but now all these problems have been solved, and the price of Bitcoin does not move in sync with the prices of stocks, bonds, gold, oil or commodities. The crypto asset class offers higher return opportunities than almost any other asset class. (CNBC)

data.title: Arthur Hayes deposited 2.468 million ETHFI into Binance in the past 5 hours, making a profit of $1.02 million
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News According to the monitoring of on-chain analyst Ember, BitMEX co-founder Arthur Hayes deposited 2.468 million ETHFI (worth approximately $2.21 million) into Binance in the past 5 hours, making a profit of $1.02 million.
This time, Arthur Hayes bought 2.376 million ETHFI at a low point in April through FlowDesk at a price of $0.5.

data.description:
Catenaa, Saturday, June 28, 2025-BTCC, one of the longest-running cryptocurrency exchanges, has launched its first-ever user badge initiative to commemorate its 14th anniversary, introducing a campaign titled “14 Years of Momentum” aimed at rewarding user loyalty and deepening engagement. The campaign runs through July 1 and introduces a limited-edition digital badge for users who meet […]

data.title: Bitcoin Price Is Cooling Without Overheating: ATH Soon?
data.description:
Bitcoin (BTC) price was hovering near its all-time high at the time of writing. However, the market hinted at a cooling effect rather than a selloff or extreme buying pressure. The market entered a phase of quiet consolidation, not collapse, as investors held off on major moves

data.title: NOYA.ai: Total loss of 14.5 ETH from hacker attack, malicious connector deleted
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News NOYA.ai released a report on the hacker attack, which was caused by a developer's unauthorized access to a wallet that had the right to add connectors to the protocol. The total loss was about 14.5 ETH. The malicious connector has been deleted, and the contract ownership has been updated to protect funds. The attacker's address has also been reported to the centralized exchange. In the future, an external security auditor will be hired to conduct a comprehensive review, introduce a delay/time lock connector and launch a bug bounty program, as well as conduct a comprehensive review of all access control functions.

data.title: NOYA.ai Reports Security Breach Resulting in Loss of 14.5 ETH
data.description: According to Odaily, NOYA.ai has released a report detailing a recent hacking incident. The breach occurred due to unauthorized access by a developer to a wallet with permissions to add connectors to the protocol, resulting in a total loss of approximately 14.5 ETH. In response, the malicious connector has been removed, and contract ownership has been updated to safeguard funds. The attacker's address has also been reported to centralized exchanges. Moving forward, NOYA.ai plans to hire external security auditors for a comprehensive review, introduce delay/time-lock connectors, launch a bug bounty program, and conduct a thorough audit of all access control features.

data.title: Gate launches Fragmetric (FRAG) and launches HODLer Airdrop, with a total reward of 250,000 FRAG
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News According to the official announcement, Gate will launch the first Fragmetric (FRAG) spot trading on July 1 at 16:30 (UTC+8). The Fragmetric (FRAG) HODLer Airdrop event has been launched and will end at 14:00 (UTC+8) on July 1. Users holding 1 GT can participate in the airdrop for free and share 250,000 FRAG.
